channel.title: Adventuring Academy
channel.description: Latest releases from Adventuring Academy on Dropout.tv

item.title: Be Yourself Everyone Else Is Taken (with Ally Beardsley)
item.description:
Ally Beardsley joins Brennan to discuss learning D&D on the job, bless dice, and rate weird sodas.

Duration: 1:27:34

Tags: Adventuring Academy, interviews, q and a, RPG, NPC, game masters, dungeons and dragons, role playing, tabletop rpg, brennan lee mulligan, ally beardsley
